subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath made utterance a magnet for attracting the followers of all religions in the realm of possibility [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی جعل البیان مقناطیسا لجذب اهل الادیان فی الامکان و به انطق
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @authentication; disposition of the Sacred Writings
